# Skill: API Contracts

## Scope

In this static site, "API contracts" are the stable interfaces consumed by external tools, aggregators, and browsers:

- **RSS/Atom feeds** — `feed.xml` (combined, via `jekyll-feed`), `feed-en.xml` and `feed-de.xml` (per-language, custom Liquid templates). Schema must remain valid Atom XML.
- **Sitemap** — generated by `jekyll-sitemap`. Must reflect all public pages. Documentation files are excluded via `_config.yml`.
- **Permalink structure** — `/blog/:year/:month/:day/:title/`. Breaking changes require redirect mapping.
- **Front matter schema** — required fields per content type (see below).
- **llms.txt** — `/llms.txt` (concise) and `/llms-full.txt` (with post listings). Machine-readable site summaries.
- **404 page** — `404.html` at root, auto-detected by GitHub Pages.

## Front Matter Contract

### Blog posts (`_posts/*.md`)

| Field | Required | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `layout` | yes | `post` | Must match existing layout |
| `title` | yes | string | Used in `<title>`, OG tags, feed |
| `date` | yes | ISO 8601 | Determines permalink and sort order |
| `categories` | yes | list | Used in URL if configured |
| `tags` | yes | list | Displayed on post and index |
| `description` | yes | string | Used in meta, feed, and preview |

### Pages (`blog/index.md`, `*.html`)

| Field | Required | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `layout` | yes | string | `page` or `default` |
| `title` | yes | string | |
| `permalink` | recommended | string | Explicit over implicit |

## When This Skill Applies

- Adding or modifying blog posts.
- Changing `_config.yml` permalink or collection settings.
- Modifying feed or sitemap plugin configuration.
- Any change that could alter a public URL.

## Verification

1. Confirm `bundle exec jekyll build` succeeds.
2. Verify `_site/feed.xml`, `_site/feed-en.xml`, and `_site/feed-de.xml` are valid XML.
3. Verify `_site/sitemap.xml` lists all expected URLs and excludes documentation files.
4. Confirm no existing permalinks changed without redirect plan.
5. Verify `_site/llms.txt` and `_site/llms-full.txt` are generated.
6. Verify `_site/404.html` exists.
